summary:
City Traders Imperium (CTI) scored 72/100 in our 2026 review. Founded in 2018, CTI offers four routes to funding: One Step and Two Step evaluation challenges, plus Instant Funding and Instant Funding Pro. All accounts operate in a simulated environment. Evaluation challenges use balance-based (static) drawdown, while Instant Funding accounts use trailing drawdown tied to the account balance.

Profit splits on evaluation challenges start at 80% and can scale to 100%. Instant Funding starts around 50% and increases through scaling milestones. The $4M scaling potential only applies to Instant Funding accounts across multiple accounts — evaluation challenges are effectively capped at $200K per account. Instant Funding traders start with half the advertised balance and unlock the full amount after hitting the first profit milestone.

Commissions are $5 round-turn per lot for forex and commodities, $0.50 round-turn for indices, and zero commission for crypto. The platform lists around 50 instruments across forex, indices, commodities, and crypto, though exact counts can change. MT5 is available outside the US only — US traders must use MatchTrader. CTI is best suited to traders who prefer structured progression and strict risk controls over flexibility or aggressive exposure.
pros: Scaling up to $4 million across multiple Instant Funding accounts
Instant Funding accounts with no evaluation required
Salary payments available for traders meeting long-term consistency criteria
No time limits on any challenge type
$5 round-turn forex and commodities commissions, $0.50 for indices, zero for crypto
cons: US clients restricted to MatchTrader platform only
No stock or share trading available
Low leverage compared to competitors (1:30 forex challenges)
Profit splits start around 50% on Instant Funding
Around 50 tradeable instruments — exact counts may vary
bestFor: Traders who prefer slower progression, strict risk controls, and long-term consistency over flexibility or fast payouts
notIdealFor: Traders looking for higher leverage, larger starting capital, broader markets, or firms with stock trading and higher starting profit splits

verdictBlocks.heading: Our Final Verdict On City Traders Imperium
verdictBlocks.body:
City Traders Imperium is a viable option if you want multiple routes to funding, including One Step, Two Step, and Instant Funding programs, all with no time limits. All accounts operate in a simulated environment. Evaluation challenges use balance-based (static) drawdown, while Instant Funding accounts use trailing drawdown tied to the account balance.

Profit splits on evaluation challenges start at 80% and can reach 100%, while Instant Funding starts around 50% and scales through milestones. The $4M scaling headline applies only to Instant Funding across multiple accounts — evaluation challenges are capped at $200K per account. Funded trader salary payments require meeting specific long-term consistency criteria. Account sizes, leverage, and market coverage are more limited than many competitors, so CTI makes more sense if you prioritise structured rules and long-term progression over higher risk or aggressive exposure.

faq.a: City Traders Imperium prop challenges work by requiring you to hit profit targets while staying within fixed drawdown rules, with no time limits to pass. You can choose a One Step Challenge with a single target, a Two Step Challenge that splits the evaluation into two phases, or skip evaluations entirely with Instant Funding and Instant Funding Pro, where you trade on a simulated funded account immediately and scale as you hit profit milestones.

faq.q: Does City Traders Imperium accept US clients?
faq.a: Yes, City Traders Imperium is a prop firm accepting US clients, but you'll be limited to using the MatchTrader platform instead of MT5. If you're based outside the US, you can access MT5, while US-based traders still have full access to CTI's challenge programs, Instant Funding models, payouts, and scaling plans through MatchTrader.

faq.q: How much do you get paid in CTI funding?
faq.a: Your profit share at CTI depends on the program you choose and how consistently you perform. On evaluation challenge-funded accounts, you start at 80% and can increase up to 100%. Instant Funding starts around 50% and increases through scaling milestones up to 100% as you progress through profit targets and VIP levels. Funded trader salary payments are available only to traders who meet specific long-term consistency criteria — they are not standard for all funded accounts.

Proprietary trading firms give you access to funded trading accounts so you can trade financial markets without risking your own capital. Instead of depositing money, you pay a one-time access fee and trade on a simulated account, keeping a percentage of the profits you generate as long as you follow the firm's rules on risk, drawdown, and consistency.
